bell_housing_sku: Bailey Hyd "Vanguard 18-23 HP to SAE-A pump mount kit" or Surplus Center equiv
coupling_sku: L-jaw coupling included in kit (1-1/8 keyed engine + 5/8 9T spline pump hubs)
adapter_notes: Native fit. Kit covers housing + coupling + spider.
notes: Current §1 BOM. All 11 GPM through one EFC then split between 2 track valves + arm valves. No inherent L/R balance.

adapter_notes: Native fit. Tandem pump = single overall mount; rear section bolts to front section per HY2-LN p11 procedure.
notes: Each section feeds one track via own EFC. Inherent L/R match. ~2 GPM/side headroom for hill assist. Both sections at full pressure overloads engine = relief opens (normal).
Front 11cc handles arm/loader. Rear 8cc splits 7.5 GPM between both tracks via single EFC. Loses inherent L/R balance on rear; gains arm speed.
Earlier conversational recommendation. Over-pumped for tracks; chronic relief = heat. Drop relief to 2500 PSI to keep within engine envelope at single-section full demand.

adapter_notes: Off-the-shelf SAE-B kit available for larger Vanguard/Honda V-twins.
notes: Reference build for ~30 HP engines (Vanguard 23/Honda GX630). Out of scope for current 18 HP plan but shown for comparison.

bell_housing_strategy: custom adapter (no off-the-shelf SAE-AA kit for Vanguard 18 HP)

coupling_sku: Custom L-jaw with 1-1/8 keyed + 1/2 keyed hubs (Lovejoy L-095)
adapter_notes: SAE-AA pumps are uncommon at this engine size - off-the-shelf kits jump from SAE-AA-on-small-engines (~5 HP) directly to SAE-A on Vanguard-class V-twins. Custom plate or re-machined SAE-A kit needed.
notes: Bracket low end of HY family. Adapter cost erodes the pump price advantage. Confirm HY1 tandem availability with Hydreco - HY1 datasheet does not show explicit tandem kit.

adapter_notes: SAE-B housing off-the-shelf. The HY3-LN 5/8 13T shaft is unusual; most SAE-B coupling hubs are 7/8 13T. Verify hub bore before ordering.
notes: HY3-LN 22cc as single pump. Big jump from HY2 family. Need 23+ HP engine to fully utilize. Documented for upgrade path.

bell_housing_sku: Bailey Hyd or Magnaloy SAE-B kit
notes: Future upgrade path with 30+ HP engine. Way over current envelope. Listed for completeness.
Symmetric L/R tracks. ~5 GPM/side headroom over per-track demand. Single section (one valve switched) within engine envelope.

notes: Listed as anti-pattern documenting why we should pick one group. The HY3-LN datasheet (p5) example HY3+HY3+HY2 is the only mixed config Hydreco documents.
